history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (>). Directly in front is cell C02 with lava (L), so moving forward is deadly. I need to find a safe path. If I turn right, I will face down (v) toward row 03, column B, which is floor (.). That is safe. If I turn left, I would face up toward row 01, column B, which is a wall (#). So turning right is the correct move to eventually reach the goal at row 04, column D.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down (v). The cell ahead is row 03, column B, which is floor (.) and safe. Moving forward is a good step toward the goal at row 04, column D. I'll move forward now, and later turn left to head right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down (v). The cell ahead is row 04, column B, which is floor (.) and safe. I'll move forward to get closer to the goal. Once at row 04, I can turn left to face right and then move east to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column B, facing down (v). Ahead is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. I need to reach the goal at row 04, column D. To go east, I must face right. Turning left from down points me right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right at row 04, column B. The cell ahead is row 04, column C, which is floor (.) and safe. Another move forward will reach the goal. I'll move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 04, column C, facing right. The goal is directly ahead at row 04, column D. I will move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
